compiled_state.title: Brainstorm Non-Epic Ticket Support
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Context
The /dso:brainstorm skill currently only produces epic-level output. When a practitioner has a story, task, or bug that needs enrichment (clearer acceptance criteria, approach definition, file path identification), they cannot use brainstorm without converting to an epic. This epic makes /dso:brainstorm accept any ticket type, offering either conversion to a new epic (closing the original as superseded) or in-place enrichment that updates the existing ticket's description without changing its type.

## Success Criteria
1. /dso:brainstorm accepts story, task, and bug ticket IDs in addition to epics. When invoked on a non-epic ticket, brainstorm asks whether to convert to epic or enrich in-place.
2. Convert-to-epic path: closes the original ticket as superseded, creates a new epic via the normal brainstorm flow (full Socratic dialogue, approach selection, scrutiny pipeline, fidelity review, ticket creation).
3. Enrich-in-place path: updates the existing ticket's description with structured acceptance criteria, an approach summary, and file paths if the ticket description or title references a module/function/directory resolvable via the repo. Skips fidelity review, scenario analysis, and ticket creation. The ticket type remains unchanged.
4. When brainstorm is invoked on an epic, existing behavior is unchanged — the full brainstorm flow applies.

## Dependencies
None — this epic is a dependency OF the "Unified Primary Ticket Model for Sprint Skill" epic (which needs brainstorm non-epic support for its user escalation path).

## Approach
Add a type-check gate at brainstorm entry. For non-epics, present the convert/enrich choice. Convert path reuses the existing epic flow with a pre-step to close the original. Enrich path is a streamlined dialogue that skips epic-specific steps (fidelity review, scenario analysis, scrutiny pipeline, ticket creation) and writes directly to the existing ticket's description via ticket comment or description update.
